hooks.command: curl -s -X DELETE 'http://localhost:3100/api/files?all=true' 2>/dev/null; [ -f "$HOME/.vync/server.pid" ] && { pid=$(node -e "try{console.log(JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('$HOME/.vync/server.pid','utf8')).pid)}catch{const l=require('fs').readFileSync('$HOME/.vync/server.pid','utf8').split('\n');console.log(l[0])}" 2>/dev/null || head -1 "$HOME/.vync/server.pid"); kill "$pid" 2>/dev/null; rm -f "$HOME/.vync/server.pid"; }; exit 0
